basic_details.job_title: LTMG Hospital & Medical College Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 52 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Brihanmumbai Mahanagarpalika (MCGM) — LTMG Hospital & Medical College, Sion
basic_details.short_information: Lokmanya Tilak Municipal General Hospital & Medical College (LTMG), Sion, under the Brihanmumbai Mahanagarpalika (MCGM), has invited applications for filling up 52 vacant posts of Assistant Professor on a contract basis, across 12 departments. The engagement is for the period till 31 March 2027. This advertisement (Cr. LOTIRU/6216 dated 15.07.2026) is issued with reference to No. MGC/F/6910/ dated 25.03.2026. Applications must reach LTMG's Central Dispatch Section by 24 July 2026, 4:00 PM, and interviews for all departments are scheduled on 29 and 30 July 2026. This article covers department-w

qualification.details: Qualifications as laid down by National Medical Commission (NMC) Regulations dated 30.06.2025 for minimum qualifications for teachers in medical institutions, as amended from time to time. MS-CIT Passing Certificate. SSC or HSC passed with Marathi as a subject. If the MS-CIT and SSC/HSC-with-Marathi certificates are not available at the time of interview, candidates must submit them within 3 months (MS-CIT) and 6 months (SSC/HSC with Marathi) from the date of appointment.

selection_process: Sr. No. Department Interview Date & Time
how_to_apply: Collect the prescribed application form from Room No. 15, Cash Section (Head Clerk-Cash), LTMG Hospital & Medical College, on working days between 11:00 AM and 3:30 PM.
Fill the application form in your own handwriting, complete in all respects, with a recent passport-size photograph affixed.
Attach attested photocopies of all required documents listed above.
Submit the completed application to the Central Dispatch Section, LTMG Hospital & Medical College, Sion, Mumbai 400022, on or before 24.07.2026, up to 4:00 PM.
Applications received after the prescribed date and time will not be considered, and no correspondence on this matter will be entertained.
important_instructions: This appointment is purely on a contract basis and not a regular appointment. A candidate appointed on contract basis can be discontinued at any time if not required. Candidature can be cancelled at any stage if the candidate is found not fulfilling the requisite qualifications and conditions, or in case of false information/certificates/papers or suppression of required information. The address for correspondence must be clear and complete, with PIN code, telephone/mobile number, and email ID quoted in the application. Selected candidates will be appointed at LTMG Hospital & Medical College, and can be transferred to a Municipal Medical College as per requirement. Candidates already in service must submit a No Objection Certificate from their previous employer. Selected candidates are eligible only for Casual Leave and Special Casual Leave as per Circular No. Director/M.E.&M.H/3644 dated 14.10.2022 — they are not eligible for any other leave. Candidates wishing to resign must submit their resignation with one month's notice in advance. If Assistant Professors become available on a regular basis through direct service, the services of contractually appointed candidates will be terminated.

content_sections.heading: LTMG Recruitment 2026: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Qualifications as laid down by National Medical Commission (NMC) Regulations dated 30.06.2025 for minimum qualifications for teachers in medical institutions, as amended from time to time. MS-CIT Passing Certificate. SSC or HSC passed with Marathi as a subject. If the MS-CIT and SSC/HSC-with-Marathi certificates are not available at the time of interview, candidates must submit them within 3 months (MS-CIT) and 6 months (SSC/HSC with Marathi) from the date of appointment.

content_sections.heading: LTMG Recruitment 2026: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Venue: Chambers of Dean, LTMG Hospital & Medical College, Sion, Mumbai 400022.

content_sections.heading: LTMG Recruitment 2026: Documents Required
content_sections.text: Candidates must submit attested photocopies of the following along with the prescribed application form: Birth Certificate School/College Leaving Certificate Domicile Certificate Medical Educational Qualification Certificates and experience certificate MMC/MCI Registration Professional Indemnity Policy Secondary and Higher Secondary School Examination Mark List (with Marathi subject) For married female candidates: Marriage Certificate and Gazette Copy of Name Change PAN Card Aadhar Card Attested Xerox copies of undergraduate and postgraduate examination passing certificates, if passed in more than one attempt MS-CIT passing Certificate

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for LTMG Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Collect the prescribed application form from Room No. 15, Cash Section (Head Clerk-Cash), LTMG Hospital & Medical College, on working days between 11:00 AM and 3:30 PM. Fill the application form in your own handwriting, complete in all respects, with a recent passport-size photograph affixed. Attach attested photocopies of all required documents listed above. Submit the completed application to the Central Dispatch Section, LTMG Hospital & Medical College, Sion, Mumbai 400022, on or before 24.07.2026, up to 4:00 PM. Applications received after the prescribed date and time will not be considered, and no correspondence on this matter will be entertained.

content_sections.heading: LTMG Recruitment 2026: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: This appointment is purely on a contract basis and not a regular appointment. A candidate appointed on contract basis can be discontinued at any time if not required. Candidature can be cancelled at any stage if the candidate is found not fulfilling the requisite qualifications and conditions, or in case of false information/certificates/papers or suppression of required information. The address for correspondence must be clear and complete, with PIN code, telephone/mobile number, and email ID quoted in the application. Selected candidates will be appointed at LTMG Hospital & Medical College, and can be transferred to a Municipal Medical College as per requirement. Candidates already in service must submit a No Objection Certificate from their previous employer. Selected candidates are eligible only for Casual Leave and Special Casual Leave as per Circular No. Director/M.E.&M.H/3644 dated 14.10.2022 — they are not eligible for any other leave. Candidates wishing to resign must submit their resignation with one month's notice in advance. If Assistant Professors become available on a regular basis through direct service, the services of contractually appointed candidates will be terminated.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in LTMG Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 52 vacancies across 12 departments, with Anaesthesia carrying the highest number at 31 posts.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for LTMG Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Completed applications must reach the Central Dispatch Section of LTMG Hospital & Medical College by 24 July 2026, up to 4:00 PM.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for LTMG Assistant Professor (Contractual) posts?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a remuneration of ₹1,10,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for LTMG Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must not be more than 38 years of age as on the date of the advertisement, 15 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for LTMG Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹1,026/- (₹869 plus 18% GST of ₹157).

faq.question: Q6. Is this a regular or contractual appointment?
faq.answer: This is a purely contractual appointment for the period till 31 March 2027, and not a regular appointment. Services may be terminated if regular Assistant Professors become available through direct service.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for LTMG Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application is offline. Candidates must collect the prescribed form from Room No. 15, Cash Section, LTMG Hospital & Medical College, fill it by hand, attach the required documents, and submit it to the Central Dispatch Section by the last date.

faq.question: Q8. When are the interviews for LTMG Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Department-wise interviews are scheduled on 29 and 30 July 2026 at the Chambers of the Dean, LTMG Hospital & Medical College, Sion.
